summaries.131130: Confirmed reproduced on macOS stable and master; requires a second app launch for the color panel interaction to trigger. Root cause not identified in comments, but the issue involves NSColorPanel state being modified when a TextField gains focus. Status: open, no fix or PR mentioned.
summaries.147558: Confirmed reproduced on stable 3.19.6 and master. Comments identify the root cause as the toolbar visually shifting or showing different items when the Apple Pencil interacts with it ã the pencil appears to register hits on different toolbar buttons than intended. Investigated in `CupertinoTextSelectionToolbarButton` (wraps `CupertinoButton` in a `GestureDetector`); needs a physical Apple Pencil to confirm whether stylus taps are properly handled. Status: under investigation, no PR.
summaries.14543: Confirmed still reproducible on stable 3.19.6 and master 3.22. Comments provide re-verification of each checklist item: cursor-position announcement now partially works, password fields still not announced as 'secure text fields,' copy/paste in rotor edit mode still broken, and password field character count still wrong. Status: open, stalled.
summaries.99511:
Root cause identified in comments: the caret and selection issues with Chinese text on Windows are caused by `
` line endings ã replacing them with `
` resolves the caret problem and the blank-line click issue. Pasting text with special/non-standard characters renders them as blocks. Confirmed not reproducible on macOS. Status: stalled, no PR; workaround is to normalize line endings to `
`.
summaries.137976: Confirmed reproducible on iOS (stable 3.13.9 and master 3.17). Root cause identified in comments: when dragging the start selection handle on iOS with Cupertino controls, the end handle's `PanGestureRecognizer` wins the gesture arena by default. Using `MaterialTextSelectionControls` explicitly works around the issue. Status: stalled after investigation; assignee eventually removed.
summaries.155081: Comments clarify the reporter is using the custom GLFW embedder example, not the official Linux/Windows desktop engine. A team member noted the GLFW embedder is an unmaintained example. No root cause identified and no fix planned for this embedder. Status: effectively closed as won't-fix (not a maintained platform).
summaries.159467: Confirmed reproducible on physical Samsung device with master 3.27. Issue does not reproduce on emulator. Comments flag that the offset returned is incorrect only on physical devices, possibly related to keyboard layout differences. Triaged and CC'd to @Renzo-Olivares. Status: open, no PR.
summaries.119326: Root cause identified in comments: Flutter 3.7 changed the text field's accessibility label from `text` to `hint` on Android, which `uiautomatorviewer` and tools built on UIAutomator cannot query via `AccessibilityNodeInfo.getHintText()`. An internal Android bug `b/267640877` was filed. Maestro worked around the issue on their side via PR. Status: upstream Android UIAutomator limitation; workaround exists in Maestro.
summaries.122457: Root cause identified in comments: using `keyboardType: TextInputType.multiline` suppresses the `done` action from the physical Enter key, even when `maxLines: 1`. This is reproducible on both stable and master. The issue may be intentional behavior, but documentation should clarify that `TextInputType.multiline` prevents Enter from triggering `onSubmitted` regardless of `maxLines`. Status: open, stalled; no PR.
summaries.100536: Confirmed reproducible on Android and web (both canvaskit and HTML renderers), but not on iOS or macOS. The HTML renderer performs worst. Performance traces were shared. No root cause identified in comments. Status: stalled, no fix or PR mentioned.
summaries.102142: Confirmed reproducible on stable and master when a cursor handle (teardrop) is visible ã dismissing the keyboard then requires two presses of the back/dismiss button. Specific to SwiftKey behavior (cursor handle interaction). CC'd to @justinmc and @LongCatIsLooong. Status: stalled, no PR; reporter confirmed still present after recent Android input updates.
summaries.98573: Reproducer clarified in comments: issue occurs only on iPadOS 15.1 and 15.3.1 physical devices using the Pinyin Chinese input method, not on simulator with iOS 15.2 or on English input. Debug tracing showed gesture detection in `text_selection.dart` receives `onTapDown` but not `onTapUp`. Status: stalled, labeled for further investigation; no fix.
summaries.138136: Confirmed reproducible on Chrome (web) with both canvaskit and HTML renderers; does not occur on macOS desktop. Root cause suspected in comments: when using Chinese IME, the browser IME may treat previously entered numbers as part of the composing text and replace them. Status: open, no fix or PR.
summaries.152618: Root cause identified in comments: when TouchID/FaceID biometric prompt appears, the lazily rendered `<input>` element is removed as focus leaves the text field, so autofill data is not populated on return. Semantics mode workaround attempted but prevents autocomplete suggestions from appearing. Issue persists through 3.24; blocks upgrade from 3.16.9. Status: open, no fix or PR; high user impact.
summaries.118606: Confirmed reproducible on stable 3.3 and master; on master the character count announcement was removed entirely (a different regression). Issue affects Android (TalkBack). CC'd to @chunhtai and @hangyujin. Status: open, stalled, no fix.
summaries.132372: Root cause not identified; comments confirm reproducible on stable 3.13.0 and master 3.14. The `MediaQuery.viewInsets.bottom` returns 0.0 and does not update when the keyboard appears, preventing `resizeToAvoidBottomInset` from rebuilding. Suggested workarounds from related issues did not work for the reporter. Status: stalled, no PR.
summaries.114921: Root cause identified in body (selection handle lives in root Overlay above all content). Comments confirm reproduction and discuss the expected use case ã a custom on-screen keyboard overlaying the text field. No workaround provided. Status: stalled, no fix or PR.
summaries.95395: Confirmed reproducible on macOS desktop and web (both renderers), not on Linux. Issue: caret width shrinks or goes off-screen at position 0 of a horizontally scrollable TextField. CC'd to @justinmc. Web-related label was later added. Status: stalled, no PR.
summaries.103136: Root cause identified in comments: issue is specific to the Samsung keyboard (not Gboard). Holding a key and selecting an accented variant (e.g., ûÂ, ûÇ, ûˆ) results in no input when `keyboardType: TextInputType.visiblePassword`. Confirmed on Samsung S10 (stable and master). Status: stalled, no fix or PR.
summaries.151713: Root cause identified in a comment: `_performSpellCheck` uses `Localizations.maybeLocaleOf(context)` which returns locale codes without country code (e.g., `ru` instead of `ru_RU`), but iOS's `UITextChecker` requires full locale codes. Workaround: add full locale codes to `preferred-supported-locales` in `l10n.yaml`. CC'd to @camsim99 and @justinmc. Status: open with known workaround.
summaries.80667: Confirmed reproducible on web (stable and master). On macOS desktop, the issue was fixed in master but not stable. Comments identify this as an ESC key event propagating through to the dialog when pressed during IME composition. Suggested that text fields should intercept ESC when composition is active. Status: web-only issue remains open; macOS desktop appears fixed in master.
summaries.142294: Issue only reproducible on iOS 15.x and 16.x physical devices with Apple Pencil support but not iOS 17+. Requires Chinese (Pinyin) IME input to trigger. iOS layout constraint errors logged after multiple tap attempts. Comments suggest related issue #138395. Team could not reproduce on simulators or iOS 17 devices. Status: P3, stalled; labeled device-specific.
summaries.67409: Confirmed reproducible on stable 3.3 and master 3.6. The error text space is allocated but not rendered when `TextField` is `enabled: false`. Status: stalled, no fix or PR.
summaries.84446: Confirmed reproducible on iOS 14.6, 15.5, 16.2, and 17.5.1. The 'Choose My Own Password' option in iOS autofill does not clear the password text field. CC'd to @LongCatIsLooong, who indicated the keyboard should remove text from `UITextInput` when that option is selected. Status: open, stalled; no PR.
summaries.99255: Comments only contain a bot message about missing priority label. No substantive discussion. Status: open, no analysis.
summaries.100042: Root cause identified in comments: Flutter only processes a key event on press+release, so long-pressing delete on a physical keyboard on iOS does not continuously delete (unlike native iOS). Confirmed reproduced on stable and master. CC'd to @justinmc; question raised about whether desktop platforms handle key repeat but mobile does not. Status: stalled, no fix or PR.
summaries.81318: Confirmed reproducible on web (both renderers) and macOS desktop on stable and master. Cursor appears very close to the last character but does not fully overlap in later versions. Occurs in both canvaskit and HTML renderers, suggesting a framework-level issue. CC'd to @LongCatIsLooong. Status: stalled, no fix or PR.
summaries.53022: Confirmed reproducible on iOS stable and master. After dismissing the keyboard via Done from a TextField, VoiceOver focuses the back button rather than the next logical element. Investigation noted this might be intentional (matching Gmail behavior), but remains unresolved. A related engine PR was mentioned but did not fix the issue on master 3.7. CC'd to @hangyujin. Status: stalled.
summaries.149164: Confirmed reproducible on stable 3.22 and master 3.23 on iOS. Magnifier shows wrong position or disappears when used with `SelectableText` inside a `FittedBox`. No root cause or fix mentioned. Status: open, stalled.
summaries.132042: Case 1 (selection handle disappears when dragging diagonally) is difficult to distinguish from native behavior per triage. Case 2 (double-tap does not select word near bottom of field) confirmed reproduced on iOS and Android. A fix was attempted in #132988 but blocked on issue #123415. Status: stalled pending fix of #123415.
summaries.151457: Confirmed reproduced on Windows 10 stable and master after Win+D minimize/restore. Also reported with `window_manager` package minimize. Root cause not identified; CC'd to @dkwingsmt. A P1 staleness reminder was posted. Status: open, stalled.
summaries.146486: Root cause identified in comments: `[FlutterTextInputView insertText:]` does not replace the composing range set by `setMarkedText:selectedRange:`, causing the dead key character (e.g., `ô´`) to remain alongside the composed character. iOS-only; does not affect Android, macOS, or web. Investigation paused as @LongCatIsLooong is working on a broader prototype for iOS text input. Status: under investigation, no PR yet.
